source.notes: Converted from player-guide JSON. Melody uses expanded playback_events when present.

metadata.base_mapping: 1 = C4 (MIDI 60), no-dot numerals in middle octave; apostrophe/high-dot = +12 semitones; comma/low-dot = -12 semitones

midi.note_triggering: Note On at event start; Note Off at event end. No sustain pedal, pitch bend, vibrato, aftertouch, or controller effects are encoded.

metadata.repeat_handling_for_midi: Expanded playback: measures 1-20, then measures 5-18, then measure 21. This follows the visible repeat start at measure 5 and the first ending over measures 19-20; the uploaded image only shows the first page.
metadata.rhythm_reading: quarter note unless underlined; one underline = eighth note; dot after note = dotted quarter; dash extends previous note by one quarter beat; 0 is rest.
metadata.timing_note: All millisecond timing fields are scaled by 1/1.3 from the previous 70 BPM version; musical beat lengths and pitches are unchanged.
